dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6164 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 28201 Franklin Parkway in Santa Clarita, California, as the “Deputy Ryan Clinkunbroomer Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Whitesides (for himself, Ms. Matsui, Ms. Lofgren, Mr. Panetta, Mr. Costa, Ms. Brownley, Mr. Lieu, Mr. Garcia of California, and Mr. Peters) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 28201 Franklin Parkway in Santa Clarita, California, as the Deputy Ryan Clinkunbroomer Post Office Building.

section.header: Deputy Ryan Clinkunbroomer Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 28201 Franklin Parkway in Santa Clarita, California, shall be known and designated as the Deputy Ryan Clinkunbroomer Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Deputy Ryan Clinkunbroomer Post Office Building.
